title: AppRoleAssignment
description: Represents an app role granted to a user, group, or service principal

appRoleId.description: The ID of the app role to assign. Use the default role ID 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000 for default access.

principalId.description: The unique identifier of the user, group, or service principal being granted the app role

principalType.description: The type of the assigned principal

resourceId.description: The unique identifier of the resource service principal to which the assignment is made

resourceDisplayName.description: Display name of the resource application

createdDateTime.description: Time when the app role assignment was created
